content.text:
Based on the visual inspection of the molecule, the covalently connected neighbour atoms of atom index 11 (C) are:

- Atom Index 10 (Element: N)
- Atom Index 12 (Element: O)
- Atom Index 13 (Element: C)

The `geomconf_index` is 6166.

question: Please find neighbour atoms of atom index 11 (element: C). Neighbour atoms are covalently connected. Report their atomic indices and elements. Also return the geomconf_index.
